headline: Consello Welcomes Former Verizon, Ericsson CEO Hans Vestberg as Senior Operating Advisor
summary: Consello, the leading global advisory and investment platform, announced today the appointment of Hans Vestberg as a Senior Operating Advisor. Vestberg joins a Consello team comprised of former senior executives and C-Suite leaders who have built, scaled, and transformed some of the world's most prominent companies. With more than 150 years of combined C-Suite experience across industries and continents, Consello counsels CEOs and boards on the most business-critical and growth-defining issues f

headline: Kodiak AI’s Driverless Truck Milestone Versus Losses And Early Revenue Base
summary: Kodiak AI announced the deployment of 20 fully driverless, customer-owned trucks, described as the largest such autonomous fleet globally. The company showcased an industry first triple trailer autonomous hauling configuration, using one tractor to pull three trailers. Kodiak expanded partnerships with Bosch and Verizon and secured a new U.S. Marine Corps contract for its autonomous systems. For investors tracking Kodiak AI, NasdaqGM:KDK, these updates come with the stock trading at $8.98...

headline: Arete Upgrades AT&T (T) on Copper Switch-Off, Sets $28 Price Target
summary: AT&T Inc. (NYSE:T) is included among the 14 Low PE High Dividend Stocks to Buy Right Now. On March 10, Arete analyst Andrew Beale upgraded AT&T Inc. (NYSE:T) to Neutral from Sell.
